DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clifford Yin and Alex Christopher (415-391-4800) of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass, LLP for Handerlery Hotels, defendant and moving party / Anne Marie Murphy (650-697-6000) of Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy, LLP for Bovis, Inc., plaintiffs and opposing parties

Court rules tentatively to sustain with leave to amend as to the first cause of action misrepresentation to allege requisite particularity; second cause of action - breach of covenant of good faith, to allege contract that was breached and conduct that ran afoul of contract; third cause of action - violaiton of UCL; fourth cause of action to to allege terms or legal affect of contract; fifth cause of action to allege what personal property elders deprived of and wrongful use. Sustain without leave to amend sixth cause of action re injunctive relief.

ARGUED - Court sustains with leave to amend all causes of action except for the sixth cause of action which is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff shall have fifteen (15) days to file the amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
